title: Hallmark Large Gift Bags, Pack of 3, Christmas, Traditional Santa Design, Vintage, Red Tartan, Brown Kraft
features: CHRISTMAS GIFT BAG: This festive and traditional pack of 3 large Christmas gift bags from Hallmark is large enough to hold a variety of surprises and presents. They're perfect for different sized gifts and treats, and will look amazing under the tree!

CHRISTMAS GIFT BAGS PACK: This pack features 1 brown Kraft background and red tartan sides design, with a traditional Santa, his sack, and a decorated Christmas tree with festive foliage and snow flurries. Each bag features brown knitted paper handles.
HIGH-QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: This product is fully recyclable, and made of material from well-managed, FSC-certified forests and other controlled sources.

FESTIVE GIFT TAGS: Each bag is accompanied with its very own traditional red tartan rectangular gift tag. The tag provides enough space for you to write your own personal Christmas wish to make their day extra special.

LARGE SIZE: These large gift bags measures 33cm by 26.5cm by 14.6cm and the large sizes are perfect for adding all their Christmas treats to. Deliver a special gift, their favourite bottle of fizz, a photo frame and more to celebrate their Christmas day.
description: From the manufacturer From eye-catching tree-toppers to iconic character ornaments, adorable plush gifts and more, we've got everything you need to help you celebrate your way and bring a little extra joy to your world this Christmas. Our promise, to help inspire our customers to live caring, connected lives full of meaningful moments, is something that we take very seriously here at Hallmark. Since 1910, when JC Hall started our company with nothing but two shoeboxes full of picture postcards, we’ve been doing our best to help people celebrate all the special people and special days in their lives. No matter who you’re celebrating or lifting up, Hallmark has the perfect card to help you connect with the ones you love.
